english: the shape of a basket repeatedly woven from bamboo

etymology.description: Depicts two йӯҡ(йӯҡ) (yГә, "fish") with their mouths facing each other -> original script of йҒҳ (gГІu, "to meet; to encounter")
etymology.interpretation: The character еҶ“(gГІu) represents two fish meeting face-to-face, capturing the concept of encounter, which reflects its meaning as the original script for йҒҳ(gГІu, "to meet; to encounter"). The notion of a shaped basket is a misunderstanding from later corruption.
